data.name: tlpPurpose.LayoutSettings
data.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-16"?><TableLayoutSettings><Controls><Control Name="btnPurposeOCP3" Row="3" RowSpan="1" Column="2" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnPurposeFOUP1" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnPurposeFOSB4" Row="2" RowSpan="1" Column="2" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnPurposeFPO1" Row="3" RowSpan="1" Column="3" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnPurposeFOUP7" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="2" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnPurposeFOUP2" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnPurposeFOSB5" Row="2" RowSpan="1" Column="3" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnPurposeOCP2" Row="3" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnPurposeFOUP3" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="2" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnPurposeFOSB3" Row="2" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnPurposeFOUP4" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="3" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnPurposeFOUP6" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnPurposeFOSB1" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="3" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnPurposeOCP1" Row="3" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnPurposeFOUP5" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnPurposeFOSB2" Row="2" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /></Controls><Columns Styles="Percent,25,Percent,25,Percent,25,Percent,25" /><Rows Styles="Percent,25,Percent,25,Percent,25,Percent,25" /></TableLayoutSettings>

data.name: rtbExplanationM.Text
data.value: Please select the LoadPort to be copied, the source Foup Type, and the destination Foup Type After selecting, press Save to start copying.

data.name: tlpSource.LayoutSettings
data.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-16"?><TableLayoutSettings><Controls><Control Name="btnSourceFPO1" Row="3" RowSpan="1" Column="3" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnSourceOCP3" Row="3" RowSpan="1" Column="2" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnSourceFOUP1" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnSourceFOUP2" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnSourceOCP2" Row="3" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnSourceFOSB5" Row="2" RowSpan="1" Column="3" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnSourceOCP1" Row="3" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnSourceFOUP3" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="2" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnSourceFOSB4" Row="2" RowSpan="1" Column="2" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnSourceFOUP4" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="3" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnSourceFOSB1" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="3" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnSourceFOSB3" Row="2" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnSourceFOUP5" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnSourceFOUP7" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="2" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnSourceFOSB2" Row="2" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnSourceFOUP6" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /></Controls><Columns Styles="Percent,25,Percent,25,Percent,25,Percent,25" /><Rows Styles="Percent,25,Percent,25,Percent,25,Percent,25" /></TableLayoutSettings>

data.name: tableLayoutPanel1.LayoutSettings
data.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-16"?><TableLayoutSettings><Controls><Control Name="tlpSource" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="tlpPurpose" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="2" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnSource" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnPurpose" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="2" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="label32" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /></Controls><Columns Styles="Percent,50,Absolute,105,Percent,50" /><Rows Styles="Absolute,79,Percent,100" /></TableLayoutSettings>

data.name: tableLayoutPanel2.LayoutSettings
data.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-16"?><TableLayoutSettings><Controls><Control Name="rtbExplanationM" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnSave" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /></Controls><Columns Styles="Percent,80,Percent,20" /><Rows Styles="Percent,100" /></TableLayoutSettings>
